route: Boarding, charter checkout, provisioning, and final setup at Blue Lagoon. First sailing leg is planned toward Bequia after checkout and weather review.
plannedActivity: Boarding, stowing gear, provisioning, systems checkout, dinghy check, safety briefing, and getting settled aboard Inconceivable.
activityIdeas: Dinner near Blue Lagoon or onboard
captainNote: First priority is getting the boat organized and the crew comfortable before we start moving.

route: Blue Lagoon to Bequia, then settle into the anchorage or mooring field.
plannedActivity: First proper island stop, swim check, shore walk, possible dinner ashore, and crew shakedown day.
captainNote: Keep the first sailing day simple and comfortable.

plannedOvernight: Mustique or Canouan area, conditions permitting
route: Work south from Bequia based on weather, crew comfort, and charter guidance.
plannedActivity: Sailing, snorkeling, beach time, and finding the best protected overnight stop.
captainNote: Destination is flexible; comfort and conditions win.

plannedOvernight: Tobago Cays area if conditions and charter rules allow
route: Move toward the Tobago Cays / Mayreau / Union Island cruising area.
plannedActivity: Snorkeling, turtle watching, dinghy exploring, and protected anchorage time.
captainNote: Reef and park rules matter here; no hero anchoring.

route: Short-hop day in the southern Grenadines, adjusted for weather and crew energy.
plannedActivity: Snorkeling, beach exploring, lunch stops, fishing where appropriate, and relaxed island time.
captainNote: This is a good day to avoid rushing and let the crew enjoy the boat.

route: Flexible exploration day with an eye on the weather window for returning north.
plannedActivity: Water time, shore time, and boat life. Confirm northbound plan before evening.
captainNote: This is where we start thinking ahead, not waiting until the last minute.

plannedOvernight: Canouan, Mustique, or Bequia staging area
route: Begin moving north, choosing the best protected stop for wind and sea state.
plannedActivity: Sail north, swim or snorkel if time allows, and keep the boat organized for the return path.
captainNote: The return starts early so the last days stay relaxed.

nextDestination: Final cruising day or Blue Lagoon approach
route: Position for a comfortable final return to Blue Lagoon.
plannedActivity: Final island time, provisioning cleanup, fuel/water planning, and return logistics.
captainNote: No one wants a rushed final return.

plannedOvernight: Blue Lagoon or nearby staging anchorage
route: Move toward Blue Lagoon or a nearby final anchorage depending on charter timing.
plannedActivity: Final swim, boat cleanup, fuel plan, trash, luggage organizing, and last dinner aboard or ashore.
captainNote: Start making the boat easy to return while still enjoying the trip.

plannedOvernight: Blue Lagoon or final approved anchorage
route: Final short movements only if needed. Prioritize return readiness.
plannedActivity: Clean, pack, fuel, settle bills, upload photos, and make the last night easy.
captainNote: The goal is no chaos on return morning.

route: Final return and handover preparations at Blue Lagoon.
plannedActivity: Final cleaning, packing, gear check, photo backup, and preparing for checkout.
captainNote: Leave the boat in good order and finish strong.

route: Charter return by noon and departure logistics.
plannedActivity: Final checkout, luggage, airport or lodging transfer, and goodbyes to Inconceivable.
captainNote: Trip complete, memories secured, no loose gear left behind.
